Indication: Pre-exposure prophylaxis (PrEP) against HIV in adults at medium to high risk of infection. Population: Adults aged 18 years or older at medium to high risk of HIV infection (MSM, trans and gender diverse people, heterosexual people, and people who inject drugs) who test HIV negative and agree to 3-monthly HIV testing.
